mapper.select: SELECT b_id, b_thumbnail, b_title, b_filter, b_op_price_min, r_count, r_avg_score, u_s_com, num FROM (SELECT b_id, b_thumbnail, b_title, b_filter, b_op_price_min, r_count,r_avg_score, u_s_com, ROWNUM AS num FROM (SELECT b.b_id, b.b_thumbnail, b.b_title, b.b_filter, (SELECT MIN(op.b_op_price) FROM board_option op WHERE op.b_id = b.b_id) AS b_op_price_min, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review re WHERE re.b_id = b.b_id) AS r_count, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(re.b_review_score), 1) FROM review re WHERE re.b_id = b.b_id) AS r_avg_score, (SELECT sel.u_s_com FROM users_seller sel WHERE sel.u_s_id = b.u_s_id) AS u_s_com FROM board b WHERE b.b_type = '비즈니스' ) ) WHERE num BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT b.b_id, b.b_thumbnail, b.b_title, b.b_filter, b.b_view_count, b.b_content, b.b_prod_on_off, b.u_s_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review re WHERE re.b_id = b.b_id) AS r_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_like bl WHERE bl.b_id = b.b_id) AS l_count, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(re.b_review_score), 1) FROM review re WHERE re.b_id = b.b_id) AS r_avg_score, sel.u_s_com, sel.u_s_zone, sel.u_s_carrer, sel.u_s_profileimg_url FROM board b LEFT JOIN users_seller sel ON b.u_s_id = sel.u_s_id WHERE b.b_id = #{b_id}
SELECT b_img_url FROM board_image WHERE b_id = #{b_id} ORDER BY b_img_id ASC
SELECT CEIL(COUNT(*) / 12.0) FROM board WHERE b_type='비즈니스'

SELECT re.b_review_createdat, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(re.b_review_content, 500, 1) AS b_review_content, u.u_nickname, u.u_profileimg_url FROM review re LEFT JOIN users u ON re.u_id = u.u_id WHERE re.b_id = #{b_id} ORDER BY re.b_review_createdat DESC
SELECT b_review_img_url FROM review_image WHERE b_id = #{b_id} ORDER BY b_review_img_id ASC
SELECT b_op_id, b_id, b_op_title, b_op_price, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(b_op_detail, 500, 1) AS b_op_detail FROM board_option WHERE b_id = #{b_id} ORDER BY b_op_id ASC
